documentation: Stores the current contents of the index in a new commit along with a log message from the user describing the changes.

summary: Update remote refs along with associated objects
documentation: Uploads local repository content to a remote repository. Use -u to set upstream for the current branch.

summary: Fetch from and integrate with another repository or a local branch
documentation: Incorporates changes from a remote repository into the current branch. In its default mode, git pull is shorthand for git fetch followed by git merge FETCH_HEAD.
Changes the file mode bits of a file. +x adds the execute permission for all users.
Searches for a specific string pattern in all files within the current directory and its subdirectories.

summary: The server cannot find the requested resource
documentation: The server can not find the requested resource. Links that lead to a 404 page are often called broken or dead links and can be subject to link rot.

summary: Generic error message when an unexpected condition was encountered
documentation: The server encountered an unexpected condition that prevented it from fulfilling the request. Usually indicates a server-side crash or misconfiguration.
Used for unencrypted web traffic. Browsers connect to this port by default for http:// URLs.
Used for secure web traffic. Provides encryption and authentication for web communications.
Matches most common email formats. Validates that the input has an @ symbol, a domain name, and a TLD of at least 2 characters.
Minimum eight characters, at least one letter and one number. Ideal for basic security requirements.
